# Jurryi Tech

> AI-Powered Patent Drafting & Prosecution Platform

Jurryi is the world's first AI infrastructure purpose-built for patent attorney teams. We provide enterprise-grade AI tools for patent drafting, prosecution, and portfolio management.

## Platform

### AI Patent Drafter
AI-powered patent application drafting tool that generates complete patent specifications including claims, descriptions, abstracts, and drawings from invention disclosures. Supports US (USPTO), European (EPO), Indian, and international patent formats.

### Prior Art Search
Comprehensive AI-driven prior art search engine that analyzes millions of patents and non-patent literature to identify relevant prior art, assess novelty, and evaluate patentability before filing.

### Office Action Response
Automated office action analysis and response generation. AI understands examiner rejections (101, 102, 103, 112), suggests claim amendments, and drafts complete responses with legal arguments.

### Claim Amendment Engine
AI tool for drafting and optimizing patent claims. Generates independent and dependent claims, suggests narrowing amendments, and ensures compliance with patent office requirements across jurisdictions.

### Portfolio Analytics
Patent portfolio intelligence and analytics dashboard. Track prosecution timelines, allowance rates, examiner statistics, cost analysis, and strategic insights across your entire patent portfolio.

### Examiner Intelligence
AI-powered USPTO patent examiner analytics. Understand examiner behavior patterns, rejection tendencies, average prosecution timelines, and allowance rates to optimize prosecution strategy.

## Key Capabilities
- Multi-jurisdiction support: USPTO, EPO, India, PCT, and more
- Privacy-first architecture with enterprise-grade security
- Trained on patent prosecution history data
- Integrates with existing patent management workflows
- Reduces patent drafting time by up to 90%
- SOC 2 Type II certification in progress

- Website: https://jurryi.com

- Industry: Legal Technology, Patent Technology, Intellectual Property
